title: DARE — Digital Lifelong Prevention
description: PNC-funded national initiative focused on pediatric T1D. I lead development of the TWIN clinical decision support system — mobile app, clinician web dashboard, and digital twin integration via ReplayBG. Co-design workshops with Bambino Gesù Hospital clinicians.

title: BRAINTEASER — H2020
description: EU H2020 project on AI for ALS and MS progression. I developed the wearable sensor preprocessing pipeline and feature extraction framework integrated in the BRAINTEASER AI models. Grant: 5.9 M€.

title: GLUCOMFORT — PRIN 2020
description: Non-invasive tattoo-based continuous glucose monitoring. I am responsible for the mobile platform for real-time BLE data acquisition, processing, and visualization of the novel sensor. Clinical trials at University Hospital of Padova.

title: BREATHE — PRIN 2022
description: Air pollution & asthma exacerbations studied via IoT and AI. I contribute to the IMPACT platform adaptation for PM2.5/PM10 and respiratory outcome monitoring across 100+ patients.

title: Post-bariatric Hypoglycemia — SID 2021
description: Clinical trial (50+ subjects, University of Bern collaboration) testing a real-time PBH forecasting algorithm integrated in the IMPACT platform. Two journal papers and a randomized controlled trial published.

title: Roche Diagnostics — Consulting
description: Two-year agreement between DEI-UNIPD and Roche Diagnostics International Ltd (Switzerland) for custom development and validation of the ReplayBG digital twin platform. Total income: 190 K€.
